task_intents: set phone to do not disturb
example_tasks: Enable do not disturb mode for deep work
Put phone in airplane mode during flight
Set up screen time limits for social media
Block distracting apps during study session
Turn off mobile data to save battery
Restrict phone usage during family dinner
Activate focus mode on mobile device
Set phone to silent for cinema
reasoning: The icon clearly depicts a smartphone with a strike-through, universally understood as 'no phone', 'offline', or 'do not disturb'. It is highly effective for tasks related to digital focus, productivity boundaries, or connectivity management.
